name: vehicle-renting-microservices
description: Cloud Native Midterm Project - Vehicle Renting System

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix api-gateway && npm install --prefix auth-service && npm install --prefix owner-service && npm install --prefix customer-service && npm install --prefix payment-service && npm install --prefix review-service
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run auth" "npm run owner" "npm run customer" "npm run payment" "npm run review" "npm run gateway"
